ingredients.item:
1 tsp caster sugar
2 x 7g (1/6 oz) sachets fast-action dried yeast, dissolved in 2 tbsp warm water
300g (10½oz) strong white bread flour
1 tsp crushed sea salt
150g (5½oz) Greek yogurt
50ml (2fl oz) olive oil, plus extra for brushing
lemon wedges, to serve
ingredients.original:
1 tsp caster sugar
2 x 7g (1/6 oz) sachets fast-action dried yeast, dissolved in 2 tbsp warm water
300g (10½oz) strong white bread flour
1 tsp crushed sea salt
150g (5½oz) Greek yogurt
50ml (2fl oz) olive oil, plus extra for brushing
lemon wedges, to serve

ingredients.item:
250g (9oz) minced lamb
2 ripe tomatoes, deseeded and finely diced
1 onion, finely chopped
2 tsp Turkish dried chilli flakes (Pul Biber) or 2 red chillies, deseeded and finely chopped
handful of finely chopped flat leaf parsley leaves
sea salt and freshly ground black pepper
